texto: They ask me what is madness and I reply it is a gift.They ask me why, and I said:The world trough the eyes of normal people is boring, but look at it trough the eyes of the mad, then you will know why I enjoy my madness so much!
explicacao: Citação de Seid Šabanović sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “They ask me what is madness and I reply it is a gift.They ask me why, and I said:The world trough…” articula reflexao, madness, trough em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
